changes: SECURITY: Remove tpix_wallet auto-verification bypass — all wallets require signature
SECURITY: Add pessimistic locking to order matching — prevent double-fill race condition
SECURITY: Enforce wallet ownership on GET orders/balances — prevent data leakage
SECURITY: Fix swap fee precision (bcmath) + reduce tolerance 5% to 1%
SECURITY: Validate JSON-RPC responses before using balance data
FIX: Mobile wallet/balance endpoint URL mismatch (balance → balances)
FIX: Auto-verify wallet after create/import with signature challenge
FIX: Portfolio uses real transaction history from API (remove mock data)
FIX: Fee rate fetched from backend API (remove hardcoded 0.3%)
FIX: Double-submit protection with useRef in trade form
FIX: Settings duplicate WalletConnectModal causing freeze
FIX: App update download timeout 60s → 5min with proper cancel
FIX: Wallet connect modal cancel button + countdown timer
FIX: Market store race condition with isFetching guard
FIX: Trade form input validation (NaN, bounds, negative values)
FIX: NaN protection in portfolio calculations
NEW: Add 8 missing API methods (swap, market, tpix, transactions)
NEW: Update system matches TPIX Wallet (file validation, auto-fallback, release notes)
NEW: Browser fallback chain (tpix.online → GitHub) when install fails
UX: Settings check update shows 'Up to date' status
UX: Language switch shows confirmation alert
Initial release
Trading Dashboard with Glass Morphism UI
Multi-chain support (50+ blockchains)
Wallet connection (MetaMask, WalletConnect, Trust Wallet)
Real-time charts and order book
AI-powered trading assistant
Multi-language support via Google Translate
